title: XCF Global, Southern Energy Renewables, and DevvStream Merger to Accelerate SAF and e-Methanol Production
content: XCF Global, Southern Energy Renewables, and DevvStream have agreed to a binding term sheet for a three-party merger designed to create an integrated low-carbon fuels platform. The combined entity plans to accelerate the deployment of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF), e-methanol, and e-methanol-to-jet pathways across North America. Additionally, the parties will explore integrating small modular reactor (SMR) nuclear power with electro-sustainable aviation fuel (eSAF) production and AI data center operations. As part of the agreement, an investor will fund immediate upgrades at XCFâ€™s New Rise Reno refinery to achieve sustained commercial SAF production. This merger aims to combine manufacturing assets with carbon monetization strategies, expanding domestic capacity for cleaner fuels. The transaction is subject to final board approvals and definitive agreements.
author: Analysts Account
